'''yagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jingoistically|jingoistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jingoistically|jingoistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yagate|yagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yagatesher|yagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagatesherĂ«m|yagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yagatero|yagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yagateshĂ«|yagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagateshĂ«m|yagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyagatero|gokiyagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyagateshĂ«|gokiyagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagateshĂ«m|gokiyagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyagankerom|goyagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyagankeshĂ«|goyagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagankeshĂ«m|goyagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyagankeya|goyagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yagaterom|yagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagatemu|yagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yagateya|yagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyagaterom|gokiyagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagatemu|gokiyagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyagateya|gokiyagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yagagate|yagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yagagatesher|yagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagagatesherĂ«m|yagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yagagatero|yagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yagagateshĂ«|yagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagagateshĂ«m|yagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyagagatero|gokiyagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyagagateshĂ«|gokiyagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagagateshĂ«m|gokiyagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyagagankerom|goyagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyagagankeshĂ«|goyagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagagankeshĂ«m|goyagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyagagankeya|goyagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yagagaterom|yagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagagatemu|yagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yagagateya|yagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyagagaterom|gokiyagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagagatemu|gokiyagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyagagateya|gokiyagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠte|yĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠtesher|yĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠtero|yĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠgĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠgĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠterom|yĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠtemu|yĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠgĂŠteya|yĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠgĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafgafte|yafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafgaftesher|yafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafgaftesherĂ«m|yafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafgaftero|yafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafgafteshĂ«|yafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafgafteshĂ«m|yafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafgaftero|gokiyafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafgafteshĂ«|gokiyafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafgafteshĂ«m|gokiyafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafgafnkerom|goyafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafgafnkeshĂ«|goyafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafgafnkeshĂ«m|goyafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafgafnkeya|goyafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafgafterom|yafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafgaftemu|yafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafgafteya|yafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafgafterom|gokiyafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafgaftemu|gokiyafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafgafteya|gokiyafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
